CLOUD SECURITY POSTURE

Only DevOps engineers have direct SSH access to production servers.
Access keys are rotated every 90 days as per security policy.
The cloud environment is isolated using separate VPCs per environment.
All S3 buckets have public access blocked by default.
Container images are scanned for vulnerabilities before deployment.
Compliance monitoring is configured using AWS Config rules.
Incident response playbooks are tested during quarterly drills.
